LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST DBA SAINT FRANCIS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT CANNOT CONSIDER PLAINTIFF'S LATE UNFILED LETTER RESPONSE AND IN ANY EVENT THE COMPLAINT IS INSUFFICIENT AND ONLY FACTS ALLEGED IN THE COMPLAINT ITSELF CAN BE CONSIDERED FOR PURPOSES OF A DEMURRER. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189
